name: Mouseflow Session Replay API
what_it_does: Mouseflow REST API for session replay and behavioral analytics platform. Enables AI agents to query session recordings, retrieve heatmap data, access form analytics, filter recordings by user attributes, and export behavioral insights. Mouseflow captures mouse movement, clicks, scrolls, and form interactions to help identify UX friction and optimize conversion.
use_cases: Querying session recordings filtered by user attributes from UX analysis agents
Retrieving heatmap data for specific pages from CRO optimization agents
Accessing form analytics to identify drop-off points from conversion agents
Exporting behavioral data into BI and analytics pipelines from data integration agents
not_for: Full product analytics for SaaS applications (use Mixpanel or Heap)
Real-time session monitoring without behavioral analysis
Simple page view analytics without user interaction depth
best_when: A UX or marketing team wants AI agents to query Mouseflow session data, heatmaps, and form analytics to identify friction points and feed behavioral insights into optimization workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Session recordings capture detailed user behavior including form inputs. Personal data subject to GDPR consent. Do not record sensitive form fields (passwords, payment info).

auth.notes: Mouseflow uses API key in Basic auth or as Bearer token. Keys are account-scoped. Simple authentication model for developer access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Growth, Business, and Pro plans scaling recordings, websites, and data retention
pricing.notes: Danish company (Copenhagen HQ). Competitive pricing for session replay. Developer-friendly free tier.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per account; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Session recordings capture detailed user behavior including sensitive interactions
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth or Bearer token
Session recording data export can be large — implement pagination carefully
Recording filters (by tags, attributes, events) require understanding Mouseflow data model
Danish company — GDPR native; EU-first data residency
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: User behavioral recordings with GDPR implications. GDPR, CCPA. Danish company. API key Basic auth. No granular scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: User behavioral PII data. GDPR, CCPA. Danish company. API key auth. No scope granularity.
